KCAL / DAY
This is your estimated Total Daily Energy Expenditure — how many Calories you burn each day.
Understanding this is key to managing your weight. Your goal adjusts this number to create the right deficit or surplus.
Initial estimate
This number refines itself as you log data. After ~6 weeks, expect accuracy within ±80 kcal.

Patterns detected
Protein drops 21% on weekends. Sat–Sun average is 78% of target vs 99% on weekdays. Pre-prepping a high-protein weekend meal could close this.

Adherence improving. Last 4 weeks: 94% on-target days vs 75% in the first 4. The model is working.
